upa-√śri P. -śrayati, to lean (anything) against,  TBr. i, 6, 6, 2 ;  ŚBr. xiv ;  KātyŚr. :
Ā. -śrayate (p. of the pf. -śiśriyāṇa) to lean against, support, prop,  RV. x, 18, 12 ;
to cling to, fit closely (as an ornament),  RV. vii, 56, 13 ;
to place one's self near to, go towards,  MBh. ;  BhP. ;
to accommodate one's self to,  ChUp. vi, 8, 2.
